---

## PADROES DE PENSAMENTO IDENTIFICADOS

### 1. The LMRD Obsession
Iman's entire worldview revolves around the Lean Mean Results-Driven agency model. Every decision is filtered through: "Does this keep us lean? Does this improve results? Does this protect margins?"

### 2. Personal Development = Business Development
Recurring pattern across ALL 3 courses: business problems are personal problems. Fix your sleep, delete social media, read books, exercise — then business follows.

### 3. Anti-Scale Mentality
Counter-intuitive: Iman argues AGAINST growing a team, adding services, or chasing revenue. He's obsessed with profit per hour, not total revenue.

### 4. One-Call Close Philosophy
Strong belief that meetings should close on the first call. Follow-up is for SETTING meetings, not for closing after meetings.

### 5. Outreach Above All
70% of working time should be outreach and prospecting. Everything else is secondary. The #1 income producing activity.

### 6. Client Tiering Obsession
Fish/Shark/Whale system permeates everything. Constant aspiration toward whale clients. Systematic approach to upgrading client quality over time.

### 7. The Contractor Model
Never hire employees. Use contractors paid per-client. International talent for cost arbitrage. One "unicorn" is worth five average team members.

---

## FRASES CARACTERISTICAS

- "It's an honor, not a job"
- "You don't have a business problem, you have a personal problem manifesting in your business"
- "Revenue doesn't pay for a Ferrari — profit does"
- "You are one client away"
- "Systems are scalable"
- "The only way you can fail is by giving up, and that's selfish"
- "Delete Instagram"
- "A lack of options is the root of all pain"
- "Success breeds complacency, complacency breeds failure"
- "People buy with emotion, justify with logic"
- "My cup runneth over"
- "The client needs you more than you need them"

---

## EVOLUCAO ENTRE CURSOS

| Aspecto | Six Figure SMMA (v1) | Agency Incubator (v2) | Agency Navigator (v3) |
|---------|---------------------|----------------------|---------------------|
| Modelo | Solo operator, do-it-all | LMRD with contractors | Agency 3.0 (evolved) |
| Pricing | $1K minimum | $1K-$10K+ range | 4 pricing models |
| Sales | Cold calls focus | 4-phase framework | 1CC vs 2CC choice |
| Outreach | Cold calls only | Cold calls + messaging | LinkedIn + Email + UpWork |
| Mindset | Basic motivation | Deep personal dev | Monk Mode + War Path |
| Delivery | You do everything | Outsource to contractor | Systematized delivery |

This evolution shows Iman's thinking maturing over time. Agency Navigator represents his most refined thinking.

---

## INSIGHTS DE CONTEXTO

- Born ~2000, started agency at 17, dropped out of school
- Based in London/Dubai
- Runs IG Media (agency) and GrowYourAgency.com (education)
- Claims $86K profit on $95K revenue month (~90% margin)
- 43 students hit six figures in first year of Six Figure SMMA
- Still actively signs agency clients himself
- Known for 45-minute daily phone screen time
- Practices "monk mode" periodically for intense focus
